text:
おつかれさまー！
まだなんか浮かんでるみたいな感じ！

でも高低差のないフロアに
戻ってくると、やっぱり落ち着くよー。

せっかくだから今日は落ち着いて
ゆっくり今後の訓練プランでも
考えてみよっかな？

Great work out there. I still feel like I'm
floating in the good vibes from it all.

It does feel good to be back on flat, solid
ground for a change, though.

What I think I'll do though, is use this good
mood to settle myself down and think up
our next training regimen.

I'll let you know when it's done, so promise
you'll join me!
